MARAZUL

Resort & Marina

A place shaped by the sea, nature, and time. A coastal destination where contemporary hospitality, a full-service marina, and an extraordinary natural setting come together in an ever-evolving community.

Become a Member Discover MARAZUL
Cancún · Quintana Roo
Where life follows the rhythm of the Caribbean. • Where life follows the rhythm of the Caribbean. • Where life follows the rhythm of the Caribbean. • Where life follows the rhythm of the Caribbean.

The Place

More than a location

Not every place needs to be transformed. Some simply deserve to be discovered.

Between the Caribbean Sea, Isla Mujeres, extensive protected natural areas, and the ancestral Mayan legacy of El Meco, MARAZUL belongs to a coast where nature has always led the way.

This is a different side of Cancun. Connected to the city, yet surrounded by open horizons, it offers a more considered way to experience the Caribbean.

A new chapter for Cancun's coast, where a resort, a full-service marina, and a future residential community come together as one seamless coastal experience.

Shaped by the sea. Rooted in nature. Designed for the future.

Life at Marazul

Everything connected

Resort

Contemporary suites and apartments designed for extended stays by the Caribbean.

Explore Rooms →

Marina

A full-service marina designed for larger vessels and life on the water.

Explore Marina →

Beach Club

A new gathering place where the rhythm of the Caribbean slows down.

Dining

Restaurant, Pier Cafe, and a future rooftop overlooking the sea.

Experiences

Experiences shaped by the Caribbean.

See Activities →

Events

Oceanfront spaces designed for celebrations that deserve an extraordinary setting.

See Events →

Residences

A comprehensively planned residential community developed with Artigas Arquitectos.

The Marina

Designed for life at sea

More than a marina. A place where every journey begins.

Wet marina. Dry marina. Haul-out and launch. Technical services. Secure storage. Private yacht and catamaran rentals.

Everything needed to make the sea part of everyday life.

Explore the Marina

The Caribbean

Beyond the coast

Some experiences can only begin from the sea.

Private yacht rentals Catamaran escapes Isla Mujeres Isla Contoy Seasonal whale shark encounters Sunset cruises

Beach Club

Coming Soon

A beachfront space designed for long afternoons, sunset encounters, and life by the Caribbean.

Beach. Music. Dining. Sea. Nothing else is needed.

Membership

Membership

Created for those who choose to return.

Preferred access. Exclusive marina benefits. Special events. Preferred rates. Priority access to future residential opportunities.

As MARAZUL grows, the value of belonging grows too.

Become a Member

The Next Chapter

Looking ahead

MARAZUL continues to evolve.

Alongside Artigas Arquitectos, one of Mexico's most recognized architecture studios, a new master plan will integrate contemporary residences with the resort, marina, and existing infrastructure.

One destination. One vision. Designed to grow naturally over time.

Welcome to MARAZUL.

Some places become memories. Others become part of your life.
